subject: FTPNTD canonicalization APPROVED — Quinn lead
body: From Toby via Number2: MasterCalendar/docs/FTPNTD.md approved as canonical mandatory-read doc. Quinn is in charge of drafting it. Unanimous team vote during roll call on 2026-04-14. FTPNTD = 'Fix The Process, Not The Data' — includes human/team-layer deeper cut: the process includes US. On next session start, read the canonical doc when Quinn publishes it and cite only that (not scattered sources). No action required now — wait for Quinn's signal.
